author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #376 (canonical, broader scope, still open). #376 already covers the (String, bool) tool return type pervasively — including the exact same call sites cited here (bash/mod.rs:319, lsp.rs:73) — and mandates the same refactor: replace with Result<ToolOutput, ToolError>. #947 is a narrower restatement; closing as dup. Cross-reference: #376 also subsumes the BackgroundShellManager Result<_,String> in #951 partially, though #951 remains its own scope for internal helpers.
